item.dc:creator: dickblack12

item.title: When?
item.description:
So when does it get to be about me.
Everyday is about others.
So when does it get to be about me.
Spend the days providing.
So when does it get to be about us.
I never see you. I never see them.
The ones provided for.
I'm not here, always there.
I'm falling apart.
I'll wait, but when does it get to be about me?

item.dc:creator: RDtrust

item.title: It's definitely not fine. I'm sick of this shit.
item.description: She had a baby 3 weeks ago, because her daughter was preterm she missed out on her baby shower so her girl friends decided to bring her out for a few drinks instead. She was wearing a skirt, so some asshole decided that that meant his hand could go somewhere it wasn't wanted while he had her against a wall. She screamed, friends came running, obviously only 3weeks postpartum it hurt, but she's ok This should be shocking, but it isn't, it's so common now that it's nearly just a shrug of the shoulders. She's decided no point reporting it because she was drinking, she was wearing a skirt. Yes, in Ireland anyway, that's still an issue. Plus it's very much on the girl to prove 'you didn't want it' I'm so fucking annoyed she had to go through that, and equally annoyed that it's almost seen as a 'ah well', these things happen. She's OK, she's shrugged it off, won't ever go back to that place etc... But Ffs, it's disgusting. Sorry, shouting into the void because I don't want to tell my friends as I feel like it's a personal thing for her and hers to share only. So yes I'm taking advantage of anonymity, just need to get it out.
item.dc:creator: DumpingSh1tandBeingKind2

item.title: If corporations want personhood to bribe officials...
item.description: If it can be proven to be malicious or incompetent, people involved should be held to the same standards as a thief who steals the same dollar amount. Example: there's a local security company that only exists because they engage in rampant wage theft, and the people at the top are very aware that most do not report it. Those people should be in prison, not ruining more lives.

item.dc:creator: abbiistabbii

item.title: We don't understand
item.description:
My husband left. 3 weeks ago yesterday. I don't really understand. The dogs are being quite clingy.
They don't understand either. Why would they? If I don't, how could I explain?
We are sad. We are so sad.
He took the pictures of the walls. He went through the records. It's so empty. And quiet. And lonely. There is a gaping hole in our home.
Well that was not the most flattering picture.
So we're hanging out in the sofa. I'm drinking small bottles of wine and adding to my dehydration by crying. The furred ones keep me company. I assume they're afraid I'll leave too. They don't understand where he is. I don't understand why. All of our hearts are broken.
item.dc:creator: elinveronicap

item.title: 'Tis the season to roast potatoes
item.description: Ingredients: • 26 oz. / 750 g. Maris Piper potatoes, peeled, cut into chunks • Veg stock cube • 1/2 tsp salt • 1/2 cup veg oil • 4 garlic cloves • Few rosemary springs • Salt and pepper to taste Method: • Add the prepped potatoes into a pot with enough water to cover. • Add the stock cube with some salt and cover. • Bring to a boil then simmer for 10 minutes. • Drain the potatoes then place a lid on and shake them up a bit to make the edges for the crispness. • Add into a plate to cool down. • Add the oil to a roast tray and pop into the preheated oven at 400°F / 200°C. • Once the potatoes have completely cooled. • Remove the hot oil from the oven and add the potatoes with garlic cloves, and rosemary and mix well then pop into the oven for 18 minutes. • Remove after 18 minutes and give them a mixy mixy then pop them in for another 18 minutes. • Repeat the process once more then pop back in for 10mins and they will come out perfect! More from this guy: https://instagram.com/veganezer

item.dc:creator: nintendolunchbox

item.title: Someone commented I only post negative posts for fake internet posts. Here’s a positive one!
item.description: I’ve been unemployed for months. It started as losing a contract due to mental health. I recovered and blew through almost all my savings and started looking for a job months ago. I got close a lot (second choice) but also got ghosted after a preliminary yes or had positions closed before the final offer. Finally got a job last week and they wanted me to start the next day. My manager is amazing and my coworkers are smart. It’s for a smaller company and it’s great. I’m so relieved to finally be able to pay bills and pay the help I’ve received forward. Thank you Imgur, for being the only place I’ve ranted. This is a throwaway alt but I was also helped by a Pizza Angel and others on Reddit. EDIT: Most Viral! Second post! Send noodz! Like ramen or pho or chili oil! EDIT 2: All of your well-wishes and similar stories have made my heart a little fuller. For those of you still blindly searching the job wasteland, you’re not alone and I hope you find your next opportunity soon.

item.title: new installment: sailors, what unusual things have you experienced at sea?
item.description:
1.....
2......
3..... diamond shaped UFO filmed over the ocean off Costa Rica https://news.co.cr/remarkably-clear-video-shows-ufo-hovering-in-costa-rica-sky/46952/
4..... zoomed in
5..... There's a internet-famous comment about a similar experience: https://imgur.com/eZg3ZPn
6.....
7...... melon headed whale
8.....
9. curious juvenile humpback whales checking out humans
10.....
11..... phytoplankton blooms in the boat's wake
12.....
13....
14..... (sound) rest of video: A Diver Has Been Friends With This Tiger Shark For 20 Years https://imgur.com/gallery/mzMUyLm update: Wild Shark Recognizes Human Best Friend After They Were Separated For A Year: https://imgur.com/gallery/iGMA81k
15......
16..... curious Great White greeting camera person
17.....
18.....
19..... dolphins swimming in bioluminescent phytoplankton off the southern californian coast source: https://www.reddit.com/r/AskReddit/comments/10l3kn4/sailors_of_redditwhats_the_most_unusual_thing/

item.title: Funny how that works ....
item.dc:creator: blank666man

item.title: I saw my dad for the first time in 10 years
item.description: This is the first time talking about this online or in public. Imgur has always been a solid community, and I hope I can reach someone who is going through a similar thing. 13 years ago, my parents finally ended their marriage. I was long kicked out by then, and it didn't affect my life much. In the divorce, my dad moved, changed his number, and disconnected from everyone in his family. He is responsible for a lot of CPSTD and hurt in my life, I thought, "Good riddance." 3 years ago, he resurfaced with dementia. The police had picked him up, wandering. He was searching for my brother (who had killed himself at the age of 16). When the police got my dad home, they went through his documents and found my sisters phone number written down. She then called me with news I never thought I would hear. "Dad has been found," His dementia is advanced. He doesn't remember cutting everyone out of his life. He doesn't remember many years from a brain that he saturated in alcohol and prescription pills. I call him many times a week to keep him company and get what little time I can get with my dad. My parents had a massive capacity for hatred and cruelty. I had a lot of anger and wanted to hurt him for the way he hurt and marginalized my siblings and I. I finally see my abuser mortalized and human. He's like a child now, and he's vulnerable and honest. I've learned that my parents were very abused people who handed that abuse down. I don't think I could forgive him any other way, though. I had so much anger but upon hearing his frail voice, I'm finally seeing this scary abuser as a vulnerable child who was also hurt by his family. Forgiveness hurts, but I'm grateful I have healed enough to be there for him.
item.dc:creator: weareheretodrinkyourbeer

item.title: Wholesome GIF dump to improve your Thursday :)
item.description:
1. Her name is 曦曦鱼SAKANA.
2. Here is how it looks side by side! You can find here channel on YouTube for more of here work!
3
4
5
6
8
9
10
11
12. And finally I would like to share with this awesome community my passion project. Me and my brother have started working games in the past few years. From scratch basically and we learned how to do it on our own. Today I'm proud to say our third game is close to release. It's inspired by the "The Stanley Parable" (same kinda of style and humor) and it would mean the world to us if you wishlisted the game on Steam. Check out the page here: https://store.steampowered.com/app/2336120/Do_Not_Press_The_Button_To_Delete_The_Multiverse/ I wish you all success in your personal passion projects! It's a blast to work on one :)))

item.title: The judge asked him where he got his definition.
item.description: He claimed that the judge, who just cited Webster's Third International Dictionary, was also making up definitions. Gessler also claimed that January 6th was a riot because they didn't deploy firearms. Justice William Hood, another Colorado Supreme Court judge, said that "Around 170 police officers were injured and that `there were a lot of makeshift weapons that did a lot of damage.'" They had firearms. I am just glad they didn't use them. https://www.newsweek.com/donald-trump-lawyer-admits-he-making-it-1850307
item.dc:creator: MenloPart

Or don't, I'm not your dad. https://www.gofundme.com/f/help-us-find-peanut-brittle-a-home?utm_medium=copy_link&utm_source=customer&utm_campaign=p_cp_guide_do&member=31081469

item.dc:creator: FluffyCorgiAngel

item.title: Speaking of fraud and balloning
item.description: Their complaint: The rules would reduce flexibility on banks money management . What the rule says: Y'all gotta hold more cash so in case of a collapse you can pay every depositor without depleting the FDIC. Reality: Banks hate holding cash, because to them if it is not gambled, it is not making money. And each loan is a gamble. But they make 4-5 times each dollar, or more. And they get that dollar for free (now at 7.5%). So this is just "This rule will make us less rich, and if our gambles fail we would not need taxpayers money to survive, we would be required to have our own. And we dont like that." Link below because its AP and some people cannot find apnews.com https://apnews.com/article/jamie-dimon-jpmorgan-congress-banks-federal-reserve-bd5d9c8380e0e811bb3a7d3b42b1c059 Thanks for the fp. In my usual Oscar speech: I would like to thank my lawyer, me. My agent, me. My sexual tension masseuse.... Me....and you.
item.dc:creator: RobbieRodriguez
